sections.paragraph:
- Original: κατέρχομαι

- Transliteration: Katerchomai

- Phonetic: kat-er'-khom-ahee

- Definition:

1. to come down, go down

a. of one who goes from a higher to a lower locality

b. of those who come to a place by a ship

- Origin: from G2596 and G2064 (including its alternate)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2596 and G2064 (including its alternate); to come (or go) down (literally or figuratively): - come (down) depart descend go down land.
